title: Make it loud
prompt: Return the string s in ALL CAPS. Strings have built-in tools called methods; s.upper() gives the uppercase version. shout('hello') returns 'HELLO'.

details.restate: Give back the same text with every letter turned uppercase.

io.because: no letters to raise — empty in, empty out

terms.meaning: a built-in ability attached to a value, called with a dot, like `s.upper()`
